channel.title: B7 Tournament
channel.description: B7 tournament site with all key information for the 19th edition 2026 in Boeblingen.

item.title: Bye bye b7
item.description: On July 24, 2020, the B7 site signed off with a short farewell.

item.title: COVID-19
item.description: On March 15, 2020, all active tournaments were put on hold during the pandemic.

item.title: B7 2020 overview
item.description: Rules, registration, schedule, location, matches, and the Hall of Fame form the core sections of the tournament site.
